name: Aarav Sharma
experience: The interview process was difficult but fair. It focused heavily on data structures, algorithms, and system design.

rounds.name: Round 1: Online Assessment
rounds.description: Hosted on HackerRank. consisted of 2 coding problems (medium-hard) and 10 MCQs on OS/DBMS.
questions: Find the median of two sorted arrays.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical Interview 1
rounds.description: Focussed on Data Structures and Algorithms. The interviewer was friendly and helped hint towards the solution.
questions: Lowest Common Ancestor in a Binary Tree

rounds.name: Round 3: System Design
rounds.description: Designed a scalable system for a URL shortener.
questions: How to handle 1M requests per second?

tips: Master Dynamic Programming and Graph algorithms.
Think out loud during the interview.

name: Diya Patel
experience: Great experience. The process tested my product sense, analytical skills, and cultural fit.

rounds.name: Round 1: Online Screening
rounds.description: Behavioral questions and basic aptitude tests.
questions: Tell me about a time you failed.

rounds.name: Round 2: Product Design
rounds.description: Case study round. Required to design a feature for an existing product.
questions: Design a feature for Instagram specifically for elderly users.

rounds.name: Round 3: Leadership Principles
rounds.description: Discussion with a senior manager about values and past experiences.
questions: Describe a conflict with a team member and how you resolved it.

name: Rohan Kumar
experience: The technical rounds were in-depth. Be prepared for broad questions on stats and machine learning.

rounds.name: Round 1: Online Test
rounds.description: Coding questions + ML basics MCQs.

rounds.name: Round 2: ML Breadth
rounds.description: Deep dive into various ML algorithms and when to use them.
questions: Explain Random Forest vs Gradient Boosting.

rounds.name: Round 3: Bar Raiser
rounds.description: Behavioral round focusing on Amazon's Leadership Principles.
questions: Tell me about a time you showed customer obsession.

tips: Know your resume projects inside out.

name: Priya Singh
experience: The process was smooth. They focus on problem solving and machine coding.

rounds.name: Round 1: Machine Coding
rounds.description: Given 2 hours to code a working application from scratch.

rounds.name: Round 2: PS/DS
rounds.description: Standard algorithmic problems.

tips: Handle edge cases in machine coding.

name: Vikram Rathore
experience: The interview focussed heavily on core mechanical concepts like Thermodynamics and SOM.

rounds.name: Round 1: Online Aptitude & Technical
rounds.description: Standard aptitude questions (Quants, Verbal) + Core Technical MCQs.
questions: Questions on Rankine Cycle and Gears.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical Interview
rounds.description: Panel of 2. Asked deep questions about my final year project and internship.
questions: Explain the working of a 4-stroke engine breakdown.
Draw the Stress-Strain curve for mild steel.

rounds.name: Round 3: HR Interview
rounds.description: General fitment questions. Willingness to relocate to plant locations.
questions: Are you okay with working in Jamshedpur/Pune?

tips: Be thorough with your final year project.
Revise TOM, SOM, and Thermodynamics basics.
Show willingness to learn and adapt to plant life.

name: Ananya Gupta
experience: Very tough technical rounds. Deep understanding of RC circuits and MOSFETs is required.

rounds.name: Round 1: Written Test
rounds.description: Circuit analysis problems. Network theory + Digital Electronics.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical 1
rounds.description: Pen and paper round. Designing circuits on the fly.
questions: Design an Op-Amp based amplifier with specific gain.

rounds.name: Round 3: Technical 2
rounds.description: More focus on Intuition and frequency response.
questions: Draw Bode plots for given transfer functions.

name: Rahul Mehta
experience: Balanced interview process testing both aptitude and core domain knowledge.

rounds.name: Round 1: Online Test
rounds.description: Aptitude + Psychometric test.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical + HR
rounds.description: Combined round. Questions on IC Engines and vehicle dynamics.
questions: Why do you want to join the automobile industry?

tips: Read about latest trends in EV and Hybrid technology.
Be honest if you don't know an answer.

name: Sita Verma
experience: The interview tested practical knowledge of concrete technology and site management.

rounds.name: Round 1: Screening Test
rounds.description: GATE level questions on structures and soil mechanics.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical Interview
rounds.description: Panel interview tailored to resume projects.
questions: Explain your site visit experience during internship.

rounds.name: Round 3: HR Round
rounds.description: Standard HR questions.

tips: Prepare basics of SOM and Structures.

name: Arjun Das
experience: Good mix of core electrical concepts and managerial questions.

rounds.name: Round 1: Gamified Assessment
rounds.description: Cognitive games and behavioral traits analysis.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical Interview
rounds.description: Questions on Power Systems and Switchgear.
questions: Explain different types of circuit breakers.

rounds.name: Round 3: Managerial Round
rounds.description: Scenario based questions.
questions: How would you handle a conflict with a supervisor?
Explain a project where you led a team.

tips: Demonstrate leadership qualities in your answers.

name: Karan Singh
experience: Role required knowledge of C++ and embedded systems concepts.

rounds.name: Round 1: Coding Test
rounds.description: HackerEarth. C++ concepts and small coding snippets.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical Interview
rounds.description: Deep dive into OS and RTOS concepts.

tips: Understand OS concepts like paging and threading.
Be clear about your project contribution.

name: Nisha Reddy
experience: Focus was on communication skills, aptitude, and basic tech knowledge.

rounds.name: Round 1: Aptitude Test
rounds.description: AMCAT style test. English, Quants, Logical.

rounds.name: Round 2: JAM / Group Discussion
rounds.description: Just A Minute session. Topic was 'Impact of AI on jobs'.
questions: Speak for 1 minute on the topic.

rounds.name: Round 3: Versant Test
rounds.description: Automated spoken English test.

rounds.name: Round 4: Interview
rounds.description: Resume based discussion.

tips: Be confident in the JAM session.
Know the basics of your core branch subjects.

name: Kabir Khan
experience: Intense process. Case study round was the decider.

rounds.name: Round 1: Online Assessment
rounds.description: Aptitude + Video Interview.

rounds.name: Round 2: Case Study
rounds.description: Solved a business problem using data given.
questions: Estimate the market size for electric scooters in India.

rounds.name: Round 3: EBI + Fit
rounds.description: Evidence Based Interview. Drilled down into resume points.
questions: Tell me a time you used data to solve a problem.

tips: Be structured in your problem solving.
Prepare multiple stories for behavioral questions.

name: Amitabh Roy
experience: Extremely technical. Verilog and Digital Design knowledge must be top notch.

rounds.name: Round 1: Screening
rounds.description: Test on Digital Electronics and Computer Architecture.

rounds.name: Round 2: Technical Depth
rounds.description: Verilog coding and STA analysis.
questions: Write Verilog code for a FIFO.
Fix timing violations in a given path.

tips: Computer Architecture concepts (Pipelining, Caches) are important.
